start_year.description: Earliest release year to include. The IMDb catalog begins in 1888; pre-1930 entries are sparse. 1950 captures the modern feature-film era; bump to 2000+ for streaming-only views.

min_votes.description: Minimum number of user votes a title must have to be included — a popularity floor that removes obscure or unverified entries. 1,000 = casually-known; 100,000+ = mainstream blockbusters.
